## Checklist

- [ ] PR title follows `T001: Add product and technical planning docs`.
- [ ] Changes are scoped to one task.
- [ ] No unrelated files or refactors are included.
- [ ] Codex summarized files changed and commands run before review.
- [ ] Documentation was updated where relevant.
- [ ] UI changes include loading, empty, error, success, disabled, and validation states where applicable.
- [ ] Tenant isolation was considered.
- [ ] RBAC impact was considered.
- [ ] Security impact was considered.
- [ ] Database or migration impact was considered.
